seo_description: Current time in Chennai, India. Live IST clock — UTC+5:30 year-round, no Daylight Saving Time. Chennai time vs New York, London, Singapore, Dubai. Tamil Nadu's capital.

faq.question: What time is it in Chennai right now?
faq.answer: Chennai operates on India Standard Time (IST/UTC+5:30) year-round. As the capital of Tamil Nadu and one of India's largest metropolitan areas, Chennai shares the same timezone as all of India — there is only one time zone across the entire country. To see the exact current time in Chennai with live seconds, use our real-time clock above.

faq.question: What time zone is Chennai in?
faq.answer: Chennai is in India Standard Time (IST/UTC+5:30). India has a single time zone for the entire country, so Chennai shares its offset with Mumbai, Delhi, Kolkata, Bangalore, and all other Indian cities. IST is UTC+5:30 — a 30-minute offset from the whole-hour pattern used by most countries — and no Daylight Saving Time is observed.

faq.question: Does Chennai observe Daylight Saving Time?
faq.answer: No. Chennai and all of India do not observe Daylight Saving Time. Clocks in Chennai remain at UTC+5:30 year-round without seasonal changes. India abolished DST in 1964, and the country has maintained a fixed offset ever since. This means the time difference between Chennai and cities that do observe DST — such as London, New York, or Sydney — will vary by season.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Chennai and London?
faq.answer: Chennai is 5 hours 30 minutes ahead of London during UK winter (GMT/UTC+0), and 4 hours 30 minutes ahead during British Summer Time (BST/UTC+1). When it is 9:00 AM in London (GMT), it is 2:30 PM in Chennai. The India–UK business corridor is active, especially in IT services, where Chennai-based firms frequently work with London clients.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Chennai and New York?
faq.answer: Chennai is 10 hours 30 minutes ahead of New York during US Eastern Standard Time (EST/UTC-5), and 9 hours 30 minutes ahead during Eastern Daylight Time (EDT/UTC-4). When it is 12:00 AM (midnight) in New York (EST), it is 10:30 AM in Chennai. The narrow overlap window — typically late New York evening to early Chennai morning — is commonly used in IT outsourcing handoffs.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Chennai and Singapore?
faq.answer: Chennai is 2 hours 30 minutes behind Singapore (SGT/UTC+8). When it is 9:00 AM in Singapore, it is 6:30 AM in Chennai. Singapore is a major financial and trade partner for Chennai, especially in manufacturing and logistics. The afternoon hours in Chennai (1:00 PM–5:00 PM IST) align well with Singapore business hours (3:30 PM–7:30 PM SGT).

faq.question: What is the time difference between Chennai and Dubai?
faq.answer: Chennai is 1 hour 30 minutes ahead of Dubai (GST/UTC+4). When it is 9:00 AM in Dubai, it is 10:30 AM in Chennai. This close offset makes Chennai–Dubai one of the most convenient international business corridors from India, with near-complete overlap of standard working hours. Dubai is also a top destination for the large Tamil diaspora.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Chennai?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Chennai run 9:00 AM–6:00 PM IST Monday through Saturday for most corporate offices, with many IT firms adopting a 9:00 AM–5:30 PM schedule. Chennai's IT sector — centred around OMR (Old Mahabalipuram Road) and Tidel Park — often operates in shifts to serve US and European clients. Banks open 10:00 AM–4:00 PM on weekdays and 10:00 AM–1:00 PM on Saturdays. Manufacturing plants in the auto corridor frequently run two or three shifts.

content_blocks.title: Chennai Time Zone — IST UTC+5:30 Year-Round
content_blocks.content: Chennai, capital of Tamil Nadu, operates on India Standard Time (IST/UTC+5:30) — the sole time zone used across the entire Indian subcontinent. No Daylight Saving Time is observed anywhere in India, so Chennai's offset from UTC never changes. IST's half-hour offset (UTC+5:30) is one of only a handful of 30-minute offsets used globally, alongside Nepal (UTC+5:45) and Iran (UTC+3:30). Chennai is 5 hours 30 minutes ahead of London in winter, 10 hours 30 minutes ahead of New York (EST), 1 hour 30 minutes ahead of Dubai, and 2 hours 30 minutes behind Singapore. For international teams, this stable offset simplifies long-range planning, though the half-hour difference can complicate scheduling with cities that use whole-hour zones.

content_blocks.title: Chennai: India's Auto Capital and IT Powerhouse
content_blocks.content: Chennai is India's second-largest IT hub after Bangalore and the undisputed centre of the country's automotive industry. The city's 'Auto Corridor' along NH-48 hosts plants for Hyundai, Ford, BMW, Royal Enfield, and TVS Motors, making Chennai responsible for a third of India's automobile output and 60% of its auto exports. The IT and business process outsourcing sector is concentrated along OMR (Old Mahabalipuram Road) and in technology parks such as Tidel Park and SIPCOT IT Park. Major global firms including Cognizant, Wipro, HCL, and Infosys operate large delivery centres in Chennai. The city is also a significant port — Chennai Port handles a major share of India's container traffic — and a cultural hub for classical Carnatic music and Bharatanatyam dance.

content_blocks.title: Calling and Scheduling with Chennai Internationally
content_blocks.content: The 30-minute offset of IST requires extra attention when booking international calls. From New York (EST), the best window to reach Chennai during business hours is 7:30 PM–11:30 PM Eastern the previous day, arriving at 9:00 AM–1:00 PM IST next morning. From London (GMT), call 3:30 AM–12:30 PM to reach Chennai's 9:00 AM–6:00 PM window — in practice, afternoon London time (1:00 PM–5:00 PM GMT) catches Chennai in late afternoon (6:30 PM–10:30 PM IST), useful for end-of-day handoffs. From Dubai (GST/UTC+4), call 7:30 AM–4:30 PM to reach Chennai 9:00 AM–6:00 PM. From Singapore (SGT/UTC+8), call 6:30 AM–3:30 PM. Chennai's country code is +91 and the city STD code is 044.
